data.body:
Brian Allen 😎

JD Vance got heckled at a Turning Point USA event over Gaza.

His response: blame Biden.

Someone in the room — at a conservative event — stood up and said you’re killing children.

Vance’s answer was to point at the previous administration.

2,000 dead in Lebanon. Al-Khiam erased.

data.body:
The blockade live with no confirmed allies. The talks dead. 

The least popular Vice President in American history.

And when his own crowd confronted him — he reached for the same answer every politician reaches for when they have no answer.

Someone else did it first.
